measured.desktop_1672x941: hero strip + day timeline + intelligence column + status rail + bottom quick row, no horizontal overflow, no page errors
measured.tablet_1024x768: intelligence column hidden by design, calendar + sidebar intact

differences: Iteration 3 completes the reference's remaining bands: the bottom quick-card row (今日复盘/习惯打卡/学习资源推荐/专注模式) links to real planner tabs and routes, with live copy (completed count feeds the review card, the computed best focus window feeds the focus card); day-view events now carry derived 高专注/缓冲 tags from priority, type, and duration.
All four reference bands are now present with honest data: hero overview, timeline with tags, intelligence column (backlog scheduling + conflict reflow), status rail, quick row.

Deliberate deviations recorded: rhythm score formula is explicit rather than the reference's unexplained 甜甜圈 value; the intelligence column hides under 1440px to protect readability; planner/tarot open in their existing panel/view architecture instead of separate pages.

Planner panel and tarot view render correctly on the new shell (baselines captured); their deep visual alignment against schedule-planner.png / schedule-card.png remains a separate follow-up and does not block the calendar workbench acceptance.
suggestions: Run the planner panel visual pass against schedule-planner.png as its own slice (goal map, milestone route, weekly plan).
Run the tarot view pass against schedule-card.png (card assets, ritual polish).
Optionally feed habit streak counts into the quick-row habit card once a cheap query path exists.
next_actions: Schedule calendar workbench accepted; planner panel and tarot view are follow-up slices tracked in the handoff.
Proceed to Wave 3 first module: campus wall (clear its 20 type errors, then visual alignment).
reasoning: Iteration 3 lands the last missing reference band (quick row) plus derived event tags, on top of the live hero and real intelligence column. Composition, data honesty, interaction states, and three-viewport behavior verify clean; sibling views open correctly with baselines recorded. The calendar workbench reaches the bar with documented deviations; deep planner/tarot visual alignment is scoped as its own follow-up.
